{"}]]}],"\n",["$","span",null,{"className":"line","children":[["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#24292E","--shiki-dark":"#E1E4E8"},"children":"  return this.http.get<Fornecedor>("}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#032F62","--shiki-dark":"#9ECBFF"},"children":"`${"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#005CC5","--shiki-dark":"#79B8FF"},"children":"this"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#032F62","--shiki-dark":"#9ECBFF"},"children":"."}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#24292E","--shiki-dark":"#E1E4E8"},"children":"baseUrl"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#032F62","--shiki-dark":"#9ECBFF"},"children":"}/${"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#24292E","--shiki-dark":"#E1E4E8"},"children":"codigo"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#032F62","--shiki-dark":"#9ECBFF"},"children":"}/${"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#24292E","--shiki-dark":"#E1E4E8"},"children":"loja"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#032F62","--shiki-dark":"#9ECBFF"},"children":"}`"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#24292E","--shiki-dark":"#E1E4E8"},"children":");"}]]}],"\n",["$","span",null,{"className":"line","children":["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#24292E","--shiki-dark":"#E1E4E8"},"children":"}"}]}],"\n",["$","span",null,{"className":"line"}],"\n",["$","span",null,{"className":"line","children":[["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#24292E","--shiki-dark":"#E1E4E8"},"children":"deleteByKey(codigo: string, loja: string): {"}]]}],"\n",["$","span",null,{"className":"line","children":["$L36","$L37","$L38","$L39","$L3a","$L3b","$L3c","$L3d","$L3e","$L3f","$L40"]}],"\n","$L41"]}]}]}]
18:["$","hr",null,{}]
19:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","id":"model-com-relacionamento-campos-flat--padrão-protheus","children":"Model com relacionamento (campos flat — padrão Protheus)"}]
1a:["$","blockquote",null,{"children":["\n",["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Importante:"}]," Protheus ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"não"}]," retorna objetos aninhados.\nRetorna campos \"achatados\" com prefixo. Não use objetos compostos\ncomo ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\\{ fornecedor: \\{ codigo, nome \\} \\}"}]," — o backend Protheus retornará\n",["$","code",null,{"children":"fornecedorCodigo"}]," e ",["$","code",null,{"children":"fornecedorNome"}]," no mesmo nível do objeto raiz."]}],"\n"]}]
